description: Verso: Unidentified text in Arabic script. May be literary. Might be a prayer with an apostrophe to Muḥammad (yā Mūḥammad...). Probably not a state document as catalogued on CUDL. Underneath there is a qaṣīda of praise for God that begins تبارك من انشا من الطين وركب فيه الروح والهوا
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
